case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. KENNETH W JONES ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, KENNETH W DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-26-2019
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-14-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, KENNETH W $1,989.30 PRINCIPAL, $331.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,320.75, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100102323)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100102323) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-14-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
